html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <style>
        html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: #fff; }
        svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
        .tooltip { position: fixed; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55); color: #fff; font: 11px/1.4 sans-serif; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 100; white-space: nowrap; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 600 600" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
        <defs>
            <marker id="arr" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" refX="5" refY="3" orient="auto">
                <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L6,3 z" fill="#000" />
            </marker>
        </defs>
        <circle cx="330" cy="300" r="250" stroke="black" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" />
        <line x1="80" y1="300" x2="580" y2="300" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" />
        <line x1="80" y1="300" x2="80" y2="50" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" />
        <line x1="80" y1="300" x2="330" y2="300" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arr)" />
        <line x1="80" y1="300" x2="230" y2="190" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arr)" />
        <text x="175" y="275" font-size="30" font-family="sans-serif" transform="rotate(-30 175,275)">R</text>
        <text x="150" y="320" font-size="30" font-family="sans-serif">θ<sub>S</sub></text>
        <text x="60" y="200" font-size="30" font-family="sans-serif">θ<sub>S</sub></text>
        <text x="140" y="360" font-size="30" font-family="sans-serif">c</text>
    </svg>
    <script>
        try {
            const svg = document.querySelector('svg');
            const tooltip = document.createElement('div');
            tooltip.className = 'tooltip';
            document.body.appendChild(tooltip);

            svg.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
                let content = '';
                if (e.target.tagName === 'line') {
                    if (e.target.getAttribute('x1') === '80' && e.target.getAttribute('y1') === '300') {
                        if (e.target.getAttribute('x2') === '580' && e.target.getAttribute('y2') === '300') {
                            content = 'Base line: Horizontal base of the triangle.';
                        } else if (e.target.getAttribute('x2') === '80' && e.target.getAttribute('y2') === '50') {
                            content = 'Height line: Vertical height of the triangle.';
                        } else {
                            content = 'Hypotenuse: The hypotenuse of the triangle, representing R.';
                        }
                    }
                }
                tooltip.style.left = (e.clientX + 12) + 'px';
                tooltip.style.top = (e.clientY - 28) + 'px';
                tooltip.innerHTML = content;
                tooltip.style.display = content ? 'block' : 'none';
            });

            svg.addEventListener('click', e => {
                if (e.target === svg || e.target.tagName === 'svg') hidePopup();
                else {
                    if (e.target.tagName === 'line') {
                        if (e.target.getAttribute('x1') === '80' && e.target.getAttribute('y1') === '300') {
                            if (e.target.getAttribute('x2') === '580' && e.target.getAttribute('y2') === '300') {
                                showPopup('Base of Triangle', 'This line represents the base (c) of the right triangle.');
                            } else if (e.target.getAttribute('x2') === '80' && e.target.getAttribute('y2') === '50') {
                                showPopup('Height of Triangle', 'This line represents the height of the right triangle.');
                            } else {
                                showPopup('Hypotenuse', 'This line represents the hypotenuse (R) of the right triangle.');
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            function showPopup(title, body) {
                window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title, body }, '*');
            }
            function hidePopup() {
                window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title: null }, '*');
            }

            document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
                if (e.key === 'Escape') hidePopup();
            });
        } catch (e) {
            console.error(e);
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
